name: Salmon Nachos
recipeIngredient: 213 g Canned Alaska salmon (pink or red)
1 Green chili (or more), de-seeded and finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Pre-heat oven to 190°C, 375°F, or Gas mark 5.
2. Drain the can of salmon and flake the fish into a bowl.
3. Mix in the tomatoes and finely chopped chilies.
4. Arrange the nachos onto a baking tray and evenly spread the salmon and chili mixture over them.
5. Top with half a teaspoon of natural yogurt or sour cream, then sprinkle with cheese.
6. Bake for 6-7 minutes, or until the cheese is just bubbly.
7. Serve hot.
Serves 10-12. Approx. 180 kcals per serving
